name: connectwise-automate-mcp
description: Sync your entire ConnectWise Automate fleet into local SQLite and answer cross-client questions the per-server web UI can't: fleet-wide health roll-ups, stale-agent sweeps, patch-compliance-by-client, and overnight drift.

connectwise_automate_server.title: CONNECTWISE_AUTOMATE_SERVER
connectwise_automate_server.description: Your Automate host, e.g. company.hostedrmm.com. Sets CONNECTWISE_AUTOMATE_SERVER for the endpoint base URL.

connectwise_automate_client_id.title: CONNECTWISE_AUTOMATE_CLIENT_ID
connectwise_automate_client_id.description: Your registered integration clientId GUID, sent as the clientId header on every request (required for ConnectWise Automate v2020.11+).

connectwise_automate_token.title: CONNECTWISE_AUTOMATE_TOKEN
connectwise_automate_token.description: Sets CONNECTWISE_AUTOMATE_TOKEN for the ConnectWise Automate MCP server. Get a credential from https://docs.connectwise.com/ConnectWise_Automate.
